Title: VPN not connecting from home office
Resolution Notes: Reinstalled VPN client and updated certificates. Issue resolved.

Title: Outlook calendar not syncing with mobile
Resolution Notes: Re-authenticated Exchange account on iOS. Enabled background refresh.

Title: New laptop setup request — onboarding
Resolution Notes: MacBook Pro 16 provisioned with standard engineering toolkit. FileVault enabled.

Title: Printer on Floor 3 offline
Resolution Notes: Paper jam cleared. Printer back online.

Title: Software access request — Figma Enterprise
Resolution Notes: Figma Enterprise seat assigned. User added to Design workspace.

Title: Suspected phishing email received
Resolution Notes: Email quarantined. Sender domain blocked. No credentials compromised. User trained.

Title: Conference room AV system malfunction
Resolution Notes: HDMI matrix switch requires replacement. ETA 3 business days.

Title: Slow internet connection — 4th floor
Resolution Notes: Network switch firmware updated. Speed confirmed at 850Mbps post-fix.

Title: Database connection timeout — production
Resolution Notes: Connection pool exhausted. Increased max_connections from 100 to 200. Deployed hotfix.

Title: Password reset — locked account
Resolution Notes: Account unlocked and temporary password issued. MFA re-enrolled.

Title: Standing desk height adjustment mechanism broken
GitHub access not provisioned after role change
Resolution Notes: LDAP group membership updated. GitHub org access granted.

Title: Zoom audio choppy during large meetings
Resolution Notes: Bandwidth QoS configured on user's switch port. Issue resolved.

Title: Office badge not working — new hire
Resolution Notes: Badge system sync issue. Card re-programmed and all access levels restored.

Title: Request to install Adobe Creative Cloud
Resolution Notes: License procured and installed. Serial number documented in asset register.
